Off Calendar Feb-22-2002 Granted Per Written Order

No appearance on behalf of Western MacArthur. Request for judgment in favor of the plaintiff JACK YUERS and against defendant WESTERN MacARTHUR CO. in the sum of $215,600.00 plus costs and interest as provided by law, in an amount to be determined later by the Court was made.
